summary: End-to-end frontend testing of the new Tool127 developer toolbox at /tools. All 31 tools across 8 categories render, command palette works via click and Ctrl+K, home search filters live, favorites (card + tool page) add/remove and persist to localStorage, sidebar Favorites group appears after favoriting, Recent section populates after visiting a tool, theme toggle switches dark<->light and persists across reload. All computational tools verified against ground truth: SHA-256('Tool127')=9dd5f68e127da764b7a8a18e4d7731ad8883835c3bc753af0c4d0763f8bcb6a6 (correct); MD5/SHA-1/SHA-512 correct; JWT is a valid HS256 header.payload.signature that decodes to {alg:HS256,typ:JWT} + {sub:1234567890,name:Tool127,iat:1516239022} and re-signs when secret/alg change; IP calculator 192.168.1.100/24 -> 192.168.1.0 / 192.168.1.255 / 254 usable hosts. JSON<->YAML/XML, CSV<->JSON, all four formatters (SQL/HTML/CSS/JS), regex/unix-ts/cron, http-status/mime/UA/DNS/WHOIS, color-palette/gradient/box-shadow/border-radius, subnet-calc & port-lookup all produce expected output. DNS Lookup and WHOIS Lookup successfully hit dns.google and rdap.org from the browser. Regression: '/' still loads with a working data-testid=open-toolbox-link that navigates to /tools, and /password + /dpd still load correctly.

issues: Console warning: Radix `DialogContent` requires a `DialogTitle` for a11y (CommandPalette uses shadcn CommandDialog without a title). Non-blocking, but should wrap a hidden DialogTitle to satisfy screen-reader requirements.
Pre-existing React warning from legacy PasswordGenerator (`<style jsx>` non-boolean attribute) still logs on / and hardware tool pages — not introduced by this MVP.

Copy-to-clipboard toast shows 'Could not copy' inside sandboxed browsers because navigator.clipboard is not permitted. Buttons don't crash but users get a red toast — consider a document.execCommand('copy') fallback or a friendlier message.

action_items: Wrap CommandPalette's CommandDialog with a VisuallyHidden DialogTitle to remove the Radix a11y console warning (low priority).

Consider adding a document.execCommand('copy') fallback (or friendlier toast) for the CopyButton primitive so sandboxed / http-only previews don't show 'Could not copy' when navigator.clipboard is unavailable (low priority).
(Carryover from iteration_3) Fix legacy PasswordGenerator.jsx `<style jsx>` → plain <style> to silence the ongoing non-boolean-attribute React warning.
critical_code_review_comments: SecurityTools.jsx uses `Object.keys(opts).map` to render checkboxes with lowercase testids (`password-opt-upper|lower|digits|symbols`) but displays labels 'Upper/Lower/Digits/Symbols'. Testids and labels are consistent; no bug — noted for testers.

CommandPalette.jsx registers a global document keydown for Ctrl/Cmd+K inside a useEffect dependent on `onOpenChange`. Because ToolboxLayout passes an inline arrow function each render as onOpenChange, this handler is torn down and re-added on every render. Works correctly but is slightly wasteful; consider useCallback or a stable ref.

ThemeContext's cleanup effect `useEffect(() => () => document.documentElement.classList.remove('dark'), [])` fires on ToolboxProviders unmount — good defensive behavior so the rest of 127.be keeps its own styling; verified by round-tripping from /tools -> / -> /tools.

CopyButton uses navigator.clipboard.writeText only. In sandboxed preview iframes (no clipboard permission) this rejects and shows a red 'Could not copy' toast. Suggest a document.execCommand fallback for graceful degradation.
test_credentials: n/a (toolbox is fully client-side and public)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Toolbox lives at /tools with 31 tools across 8 categories. Data-testids to know: search-trigger, command-input, command-item-<id>, home-search, sidebar-<id>, desktop-sidebar, favorite-<id> (home card), tool-favorite (tool page), theme-toggle, category-section-<catid>, tool-card-<id>, direction-toggle, json-yaml-output-value / json-xml-output-value / csv-json-output-value (textareas — read via .value), error-banner, jwt-alg, jwt-secret, jwt-payload, jwt-output-value, hash-input, hash-MD5/hash-SHA-1/hash-SHA-256/hash-SHA-512 (labels are the uppercase suffix), password-length, password-opt-upper|lower|digits|symbols, password-value, password-regenerate, strength-input, strength-result, uuid-count, uuid-generate, uuid-list, http-search / mime-search / port-search, ip-address, ip-prefix, ip-result, ip-error, subnet-cidr, dns-domain / dns-type / dns-lookup-btn / dns-results, whois-domain / whois-lookup-btn / whois-result. LocalStorage keys: 'tool127-theme', 'tool127-favorites', 'tool127-recents'. To read output panel values (textareas) use el.value (input_value) — not get_attribute('value'). For range sliders use the native input value setter + input+change events (React uses the hidden value tracker). DNS and WHOIS DID succeed from this sandbox — dns.google (DoH) and rdap.org are reachable.
rca of the issue: No open bugs. All requested features verified. Two low-priority carryover / minor a11y items only.
